costs_slippage.handling: qfa backtest has no transaction-cost parameter; post-cost proxy subtracts 5 bps times estimated one-way daily target-weight turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real OHLCV via qfa/AlpacaGateway; --data-csv not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs deleted after qfa JSON capture.

decision_rationale: Rejected: median random-window post-cost Sharpe 0.6544, p25 -0.1215, max abs orthogonality corr 0.98065061.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained latest.json curves where available

warnings: qfa pre-cost metrics do not include native costs; post-cost proxy is ex-post.
Daily OHLCV half-life proxy is noisy and not a fitted exponential half-life.
